name: Spellcasting (Sorcerer)
scalingSummary: Full caster (known); Charisma-based; 2 spells known at L1, scaling to 15
mechanicalSummary: Known caster — learn a fixed number of sorcerer spells. Full caster slot progression. 4 cantrips at L1. Cannot swap spells as freely as prepared casters.

name: Font of Magic
scalingSummary: Points = sorcerer level (2 at L2, 20 at L20)
mechanicalSummary: Gain sorcery points. Flexible Casting: as a bonus action, convert points to spell slots or slots to points. Conversion rates: 1st=2, 2nd=3, 3rd=5, 4th=6, 5th=7 points.

evidence.pointer: Sorcerer L2: Font of Magic; featureDescriptions

notes: Bonus action to convert between slots and points.

name: Metamagic
scalingSummary: 2 options at L3, 3 at L10, 4 at L17
mechanicalSummary: Learn Metamagic options that modify spells: Careful (save protection, 1 SP), Distant (2× range, 1 SP), Empowered (reroll damage dice, 1 SP), Extended (2× duration, 1 SP), Heightened (disadvantage on save, 3 SP), Quickened (bonus action cast, 2 SP), Subtle (no components, 1 SP), Twinned (double target, SP = spell level).

evidence.pointer: Sorcerer L3: Metamagic; L10/L17: more options; featureDescriptions

notes: Metamagic options modify spells, not separate actions. Quickened Spell is the most action-relevant: changes casting time to bonus action.

name: Sorcerous Restoration
trigger: When rolling initiative with 0 sorcery points
mechanicalSummary: Regain 4 sorcery points when rolling initiative with none left.

name: Elemental Affinity (Draconic Bloodline)
scalingSummary: Add Charisma modifier to one damage roll of spells matching draconic element
mechanicalSummary: Add Charisma modifier to one damage roll when casting a spell dealing your draconic element's damage. Can also spend 1 SP to gain resistance to that damage type for 1 hour.

name: Dragon Wings (Draconic Bloodline)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, manifest spectral dragon wings granting fly speed equal to current walking speed. Lasts until dismissed as a bonus action.

name: Draconic Presence (Draconic Bloodline)
mechanicalSummary: Spend 5 SP as an action to project an aura of awe/fear (60 ft) for 1 minute (concentration). Creatures make Wis save or be charmed (awe) or frightened (fear).

name: Tides of Chaos (Wild Magic)
trigger: When making an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw
rechargeSummary: Long rest (or when DM forces a Wild Magic Surge before next long rest)
mechanicalSummary: Gain advantage on one attack roll, ability check, or saving throw. DM can have you roll on Wild Magic Surge table to regain use before a long rest.

name: Bend Luck (Wild Magic)
trigger: When a creature you can see makes an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw
mechanicalSummary: Spend 2 SP as a reaction to add or subtract 1d4 from the roll.

name: Favored by the Gods (Divine Soul)
trigger: When failing a saving throw or missing with an attack roll
mechanicalSummary: Add 2d4 to the failed save or missed attack, potentially turning it into a success.

evidence.pointer: divine-soul L1: Favored by the Gods

name: Tempestuous Magic (Storm Sorcery)
trigger: Immediately before or after casting a levelled spell
mechanicalSummary: Use a bonus action to fly up to 10 ft without provoking opportunity attacks.

name: Heart of the Storm (Storm Sorcery)
trigger: When casting a spell of 1st+ level dealing lightning or thunder damage
mechanicalSummary: Deal lightning or thunder damage equal to half sorcerer level to up to 3 creatures of your choice within 10 ft.

evidence.pointer: storm-sorcery L6: Heart of the Storm

name: Storm's Fury (Storm Sorcery)
trigger: When hit by a melee attack
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to deal lightning damage equal to half sorcerer level to the attacker. On failed Strength save, pushed 20 ft away.

name: Hound of Ill Omen (Shadow Magic)
mechanicalSummary: Spend 3 SP as a bonus action to summon a dire wolf hound targeting a creature within 120 ft. Hound attacks the target and while within 5 ft of it, the target has disadvantage on saves vs your spells.

evidence.pointer: shadow-magic L6: Hound of Ill Omen

name: Umbral Form (Shadow Magic)
mechanicalSummary: Spend 6 SP as a bonus action to transform into a shadow form for 1 minute (concentration). Resistance to all damage but force and radiant. Can move through occupied spaces and objects (1d10 force if ending inside).

name: Revelation in Flesh (Aberrant Mind)
mechanicalSummary: Spend SP as a bonus action to transform for 10 minutes: see invisibility (1 SP), fly speed = walking + hover (2 SP), swim speed = 2× walking + water breathing (1 SP), squeeze through 1-inch gaps (1 SP).

name: Bastion of Law (Clockwork Soul)
mechanicalSummary: As an action, spend SP to create a protective ward on yourself or an ally within 30 ft. Ward absorbs damage (d8s equal to 5×SP) until depleted or next long rest.
